title: The Bank Heist That Fooled an Entire Nation
title_full: The Bank Heist That Fooled an Entire Nation #Shorts #truecrime #heist #crime
description:
Could this happen today?

This 1971 bank heist in Buenos Aires sounds like fiction, but it actually happened! A thief convinced hostages to help him, used a fake bomb, and vanished without a trace. Follow for more unbelievable true stories!
